ocr_findings.description: Section numbering rendered as plain list items (e.g., '1-1', '1-2') rather than inside the styled orange badge boxes shown in the image — cosmetic only, no text loss.

reviewer_notes: Four past-exam questions (問題1-1 through 1-4) with ア/イ/ウ/エ choices. Answer line at bottom '問題1-1 ア 問題1-2 イ 問題1-3 イ 問題1-4 エ' fully captured — answer_line_loss issue confirmed absent. All question text and choices accurately reproduced. Header 'コレが出る！' badge not captured but contains no additional text.
